Appearances:
Plaintiff is not present.
Attorney Francisco Gutierrez), Esq. of M.C. Hall & Associates (415-512-9865), counsel for the plaintiff is present.
Defendant is not present.

The settlement conference does not take place and is taken off at request of plaintiff counsel who appears and represents that the matter has settled outside of court. The trial date of OCT-27-2014 is vacated.
